contactCta.title: Ready for Your Custom Design?
contactCta.text: Every tattoo tells a story. Let's create yours together. Whether you have a clear vision or need creative guidance, I'm here to bring your ideas to life with artistic excellence and technical precision.

about.metaTitle: About Me - Jelena Lazić | Academic Painter & Tattoo Artist
about.metaDescription: Learn about Jelena Lazić, academic painter and professional tattoo artist in Belgrade. Combining artistic excellence with tattooing since 2013.
about.title: About Me
about.p1: An academic painter, I graduated from the Faculty of Applied Arts, Department of Mural Painting. After successful mural projects, I participated in numerous group exhibitions, exploring the boundaries of visual expression through various mediums.
about.p2: Since 2013, I have been working as a tattoo artist, combining my artistic skills with this unique medium. My tattoos often reflect influences from my painting style—bringing the same attention to composition, color theory, and narrative that I developed in my fine art practice.
about.p3: I currently live and work in Belgrade, where I continue to develop my artistic expression. Each tattoo is approached as a unique artistic collaboration, combining technical mastery with creative vision to create lasting works of art on skin.
about.educationText: Faculty of Applied Arts, Department of Mural Painting. Academic training in traditional and contemporary art techniques, with focus on large-scale visual composition.
about.experienceText: Professional tattoo artist since 2013. Extensive portfolio of custom designs, from realistic portraits to abstract compositions. Participated in numerous art exhibitions and collaborative projects.
about.ctaText: Ready to start your custom tattoo journey?

store.customDesignsText: Exclusive one-of-a-kind tattoo designs and classic designs available for purchase and use.
store.artPrintsText: High-quality prints of original artwork and favorite tattoo designs for your space.

store.digitalText: Reference sheets, flash designs, and digital art for your personal collection.
store.followText: Want to be notified when the store launches? Follow me on Instagram for updates, exclusive previews, and special launch offers.
store.altIntro: In the meantime, explore my work or get in touch about a custom tattoo:
